entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

entry.title: ʯͷ������
entry.content: #include <stdio.h>#include <stdint.h>#include <time.h>#include <stdlib.h> #define u32 uint32_t#define ROCK 1#define PAPER 2#define SCISSORS 3 void destemine_winner(u32 player_move, u32 computer_move){ //首先排除平局的情�? if (player_move == computer_move) { puts("平局�?"); return; } //定义一个胜利的规则映射，其中键是玩家的移动，值是玩家移动可以打败计算机的移动 u32 winning_moves[4] = { 0, SCISSORS, ROCK, PAPER }; //0是占位符 //winning_moves[1] SCISSORS //ROCK == 1 //PAPER == 2 //SCISSORS == 3 //这里player_move是玩家的移动，winning_moves[player_move]这个是可以打败计算机的移�? //比如说玩家�?1，只有当计算机�?3时才会输，那么就将winning_moves中的winning_moves[1]设置�?3 if (computer_move == winning_moves[player_move]) { puts("你赢了！"); } else { puts("你输了！"); }} u32 get_player_choice() { u32 choice; puts("请选择�?1是石头，2是布�?3是剪刀"); scanf_s("%d", &choice); while (choice < ROCK || choice > SCISSORS) { puts("无效选择！请重新选择�?1是石头，2是布�?3是剪刀"); scanf_s("%d", &choice); } return choice;} u32 get_computer_choice() { return (rand() % (SCISSORS - ROCK + 1)) + ROCK;} void print_instructions() { puts("石头~剪刀~布，游戏开始！"); puts("规则：输入数字，确定猜拳�?1是石头，2是布�?3是剪刀"); puts("==========================================");}void print_choice(u32 choice) { switch (choice) { case ROCK: puts("石头"); break; case PAPER: puts("�?"); break; case SCISSORS: puts("剪刀"); break; }} int main(void){ //初始化随机数生成�? srand(time(NULL)); //打印游戏说明 print_instructions(); //获取玩家和计算机的选择 u32 player_choice = get_player_choice(); u32 computer_choice = get_computer_choice(); //展示玩家和计算器的选择 puts("你选择�?"); print_choice(player_choice); puts("计算机选择�?"); print_choice(computer_choice); //判断确认赢家，并且展�? destemine_winner(player_choice, computer_choice); return 0;}
